A [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] '''[[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]]''' was present in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] met [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] for the first time in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. He was engaged in conversation with one of the [[Tonnika sisters/Legends|Tonnika sisters]], whom unknown to him was actually [[Karoly D'ulin]] in disguise.

==Behind the scenes==
This moisture farmer first appears in the [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], portrayed by an uncredited actor, conferring with one of the Tonnika sisters. Many have often identified this moisture farmer as character [[Ariq Joanson]], though [[Leland Chee]] clarified this wasn't Joanson.
